title: lastrea subochthodes
intro: Lastrea subochthodes, also known as the Indian fern, is a type of plant belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lastrea subochthodes include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and improve overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be consumed as a tea or supplement.
